creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 190746
irc/irssi: 1.1.1 diff

This patch updates irssi to 1.1.1 fixing CVEs: CVE-2018-7054, CVE-2018-7053, CVE-2018-7050, CVE-2018-7052, CVE-2018-7051.

Details of these CVEs can be found at https://irssi.org/security/html/irssi_sa_2018_02/

Patch was submitted by tj@mrsk.me and tested in `poudriere testport`.
